# SqueezeOS — by ScriptMasterLabs

> Real-time x402 intent auction and institutional squeeze detection engine. Part of ScriptMasterLabs ecosystem.

## What SqueezeOS Does
- Ghost Monitor dual-matrix scanner
- TradingView webhook-driven institutional flow analysis
- Real-time squeeze detection for AMC, GME, 0DTE options
- x402/HTTP-402 intent auction layer

## Ecosystem
- [ScriptMasterLabs](https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com): Main hub
- [Nexus-402](https://www.nexus-402.com): x402 payment infrastructure
- [x402 Paywall](https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/x402-paywall.html): @relayos/mcp-paywall on npm

## Contact
- Email: scriptmasterlabs@gmail.com
- Ecosystem: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com
